productDisplayName: BIBA OUTLET Women Printed Navy Blue Kaftan Top
description: Composition Navy blue printed kaftan top made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck with embroidery and sequin detailing, ruched at the empire waist and has pink piping along the armholes to the hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron Designed to celebrate womanhood in all its facets, this kaftan top from biba is inspired by traditional Indian print and dye arts that make it a special wardrobe favourite. The soft cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the ruching at the empire waist ensures a perfect fit. Team it with leggings or denims, chunky accessories and mojris. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
